_meta.purpose: Surfaces where mathematical/technical content is load-bearing — the math IS the argument. Sloppytoppy applies elevated length thresholds (target_max × 1.5) and disables the jargon-density + concept-stacking penalties. Optional per-surface field `disable_sentence_complexity: true` additionally disables the sentence-complexity penalty for surfaces whose math requires long compound inference-chain sentences (added 2026-05-16 v1.1 after WIN-038.detail_evidence calibration miss — 33+ long sentences explaining Bessel-zero math took an -8 understandability hit that the rubric's blanket sentence-complexity rule couldn't distinguish from genuinely sloppy prose). Curated by operator + tinker; sloppytoppy reads but does not modify. PROP-039 reference.

schema_version_history.change: Initial seed — blanket math-dense flag disables jargon + concept-stacking.

Added optional per-surface `disable_sentence_complexity: true` field. Defaults false. Set true on WIN-038.detail_evidence after calibration miss (composite=5.2 vs expected ~7.5). Conservative rollout — promote to other math-dense surfaces only if next scoring run shows similar structural misses.

_meta.seed_rationale: Tinker's proposed seed (PROP-039 Q-OP-6). Operator confirmed defaults 2026-05-16. Expand as needed via direct file edit. 2026-05-16 cleanup: removed 2 placeholder IDs (part4.html#falsifiability-geometry, part4.html#solar-distance-derivation) that did not match any <details> block in data/sections.json (per sloppytoppy first-run flag-mismatch warning). Surfaces in part4 are p4-41-0, p4-42-1, p4-421..427, p4-43-2, p4-44-3, registry-framing-audit — no falsifiability-geometry or solar-distance-derivation equivalent. If math-dense flagging is needed for part4 in the future, add by actual block ID.

surfaces.rationale: Tesla wave-speed derivation — 0.08484s, 1.57c phase velocity, Earth-ionosphere waveguide math
Numerical agreement explanation (disc circumference = globe circumference by construction)
Bessel-zero math + PEC TM mode + cavity eigenvalue derivation
surfaces.disable_sentence_complexity_rationale: First-run calibration miss 2026-05-16: composite=5.2 vs expected ~7.5. Sonnet diagnosis: 33+ long sentences explaining the Bessel-zero derivation took an -8 sentence-complexity hit. Math-inference-chain prose ('if X then Y because Z, which by Bessel's identity equals W...') requires compound sentences to preserve the proof structure — shortening would break the math, not improve readability. Per-surface exemption preserves the audit trail; if future scoring runs show analogous misses on WIN-001.detail_evidence or WIN-034.detail_evidence, promote those individually before considering a blanket math-dense rule change.

surfaces.rationale: TM01 (5.73 Hz), TM11 (9.13 Hz) vs 7.83 Hz Schumann mismatch math
RAR lensing extension math — requires specific gravitational lens calculations
Acoustic resonance + 7.83 Hz reproduction attempt math
Cavity fundamental frequency 8.78 Hz = c/(4×H_max) derivation; copper firmament EM math
AIC/BIC information-criterion math for nested-model-selection defender pivot

note: Surface IDs follow the same convention as scores.json: 'WIN-NNN.<field>' for WIN fields, 'part<N>.html#<block-id>' for section blocks. The section IDs above are placeholders — sloppytoppy should resolve them on first read against actual data/sections.json content and flag any mismatches in the run summary.
